overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's neon-lit urban center. The player moves from rain-slicked streets through covered corridors and bustling plazas filled with holographic advertisements, food stalls, and pedestrians, finally ascending a monumental staircase to an upper city level.

events.description: entering covered corridor from open street with wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking along wet pavement past neon-lit storefronts, then entering a covered corridor illuminated by purple neon lights and ascending a flight of stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wet street with green neon reflections, then transitions into a covered corridor illuminated by purple neon lights. The camera moves forward through the corridor and begins ascending a concrete stairwell where pedestrians are walking in the opposite direction.

segments.scene_description: After ascending the stairs, the scene opens into a covered commercial plaza bustling with activity. The camera moves past food stalls illuminated by bright cyan neon pillars and holographic advertisements. Various NPCs browse the stalls and walk through the plaza, which features a mix of purple and cyan lighting against the dark concrete architecture.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the covered plaza into a more open area featuring palm trees and massive holographic billboards floating above. The lighting shifts to dominant purple and pink neon as the camera approaches a circular food stand with bright purple neon trim. The ground remains wet, reflecting the vibrant lights.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered market walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. Blue neon strip lights line the right side, illuminating various food stalls and bar counters. The camera moves past a person in a white hat standing at a bar, then approaches a large directional sign and a wide staircase leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental staircase leading to upper city level

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the camera ascending a monumental staircase illuminated by blue neon edge lighting. At the top, the scene opens into an upper plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in massive digital billboards and neon advertisements. The scale shifts from intimate market spaces to the grand verticality of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked street through a series of neon-lit commercial hubs. It begins on a wet road shimmering with green reflections before gliding into a covered corridor bathed in purple light and ascending a concrete stairwell crowded with pedestrians. As the camera reaches the top, the space opens into a bustling commercial plaza where the lighting shifts to bright cyan pillars and holographic advertisements surrounding various food stalls. The scene then expands further into an open area featuring palm trees and massive floating billboards, with the color palette transitioning to dominant pinks and purples. Finally, the camera moves across the reflective, wet ground toward a circular food stand trimmed in vibrant purple neon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, sheltered confines of a market walkway into the overwhelming verticality of a neon-lit upper plaza. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, gliding past food stalls and bar counters illuminated by blue neon strip lights. As the camera moves past a figure in a white hat, the space narrows toward a large directional sign before turning toward a wide set of stairs. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends the monumental staircase, guided by blue edge lighting that leads upward and out of the covered area. Finally, the view opens into a grand upper plaza, where the scale expands to reveal towering skyscrapers draped in massive digital billboards and glowing advertisements.
